## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (fmt, vet, lint, test)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] No arsenal source code or cheatsheet content bundled (import, never bundle)
- [ ] No secrets/API keys committed
- [ ] Public API / `pkg/format` changes are versioned and documented
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (feat:, fix:, docs:, …)
